name: Low-Fat Pineapple Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese in a bowl.
2. Mix the gelatin with hot water until dissolved.
3. Make the pie crust by combining crumbled graham crackers and margarine; place in a buttered 9x2x12 inch baking dish, reserving 1/4 cup for topping.
4. Press the crust mixture into the baking dish.
5. Cream the softened cream cheese, gradually adding sugar, then add the gelatin very slowly and mix thoroughly.
6. In a large bowl, beat evaporated skim milk with an electric mixer until fluffy.
7. Mix in the gelatin mixture.
8. Add drained pineapple and stir.
9. Add chopped lemon balm leaves (if using) and stir.
10. Pour the filling into the baking dish and sprinkle remaining crumbs on top.
11. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
